task: OpenClaw 2026.7.1 Upgrade, Feature Adoption, and Harness OS Web Dashboard Integration

governance_bootstrap.summary: Deployment requires git commit/push to origin/main and deploy_to_macmini.sh execution.
Single source of truth is origin/main; production deployment via deploy script.

verification.name: watchdog interval and logging
verification.result: Interval updated to 300s with crash cause classification and session count logging.

verification.name: session persistence
verification.result: JSONL session persistence write-behind and restore routines integrated.

verification.name: unified usage API & dashboard
verification.result: Unified usage API and OpenClaw 7.1 dashboard UI active and displaying live metrics.

deploy.method: commit and push followed by scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh
deploy.result: Commit, push, and targeted Mac Mini deploy with frontend rebuild.

residual_risk: Sonnet 5 A/B testing active on Mac Mini .env.
